items.headline_ai: Fidus redeems $125M of 3.50% notes due 2026 on June 29 with make-whole premium
items.snippet: Fidus Investment notified holders it will redeem $125M of its 3.50% notes due 2026 on June 29, 2026 at 100% of principal plus make-whole premium.

items.snippet: Fidus Q1 2026 adjusted NII was $0.62/share with total investment income of $47.5M; board declared a $0.62/share Q2 2026 total dividend.
